title: Full Editorial System For A European Appliance Brand
description: I built a complete editorial system for a mid-size European home appliance brand — starting from scattered Notion docs and disconnected decks, all the way to a functioning blog and an in-house team that could actually use it.

content.heading: What I did
items: Defined the brand’s editorial voice across product, support, and marketing
Set up a content calendar and an ops dashboard to manage workload
Structured a modular blog using Framer CMS
Wrote internal guidelines for writing and localization

content.heading: Why it matters
items: Now, their team doesn’t just publish when someone has time — they follow a rhythm, with clarity and consistency.
The blog works like a newsroom. That’s the difference.

items.caption: In-house operations dashboard built for tracking workload.
